name.full: Tax PDF Forms Agent via APIM

description.short: Foundry agent package for tax PDF forms.
description.full: Teams package for the Tax PDF Forms agent routed through Azure API Management.

commands.title: Ask
commands.description: Ask a question about tax PDF forms

commands.title: Indiana fields
commands.prompt: List the purchaser or organization identification fields that must be completed on the Indiana tax exemption certificate.

commands.title: Indiana exemptions
commands.prompt: What exemption reason categories or qualifying uses are described in the Indiana tax exemption certificate?

commands.title: Indiana penalties
commands.prompt: What certifications, signature statements, or penalties are attached to signing the Indiana tax exemption certificate?

commands.title: WV buyer cert
commands.description: Explain the West Virginia buyer certification
commands.prompt: In lq_tax_exemption_WV_002_red.pdf, what is the buyer certifying when using the West Virginia resale certificate?

commands.title: WV seller warnings
commands.prompt: What recordkeeping expectations, seller responsibilities, or misuse warnings are stated in the West Virginia resale certificate?

disclaimer.text: Answers are grounded in the configured tax PDF documents and may reflect deployment-time search data.

commands.title: Ask Tax PDF Forms
commands.description: Ask a question about tax PDF forms

samplePrompts.text: What identification fields must be completed on the Indiana tax exemption certificate?
What exemption reasons are listed in the Indiana tax exemption certificate?
What certifications or penalties are attached to signing the Indiana exemption form?
What is the buyer certifying when using the West Virginia resale certificate?
What seller recordkeeping or misuse warnings appear on the West Virginia resale certificate?

parameters.name: prompt
parameters.title: Question
parameters.description: Your question about tax PDF forms
